shared_attributes.hitbox_margin: 3px smaller than sprite on all sides

context.role: Ground obstacle requiring player to jump
context.screen_position: Spawns at x=650px (screen_width + 50), y=0px (ground level), scrolls left
context.usage_scenario: Primary obstacle from game start (0+ points), spawned by SpawnSystem with 40% probability, requires basic jump to clear

visual_specification.shape: Single vertical cactus with spikes, narrow profile
visual_specification.texture: Pixel art, hard edges, spiky protrusions
visual_specification.details: Vertical desert cactus with visible spikes on sides, simple silhouette, clearly dangerous appearance

relationships.shared_with: Same color and style as cactus_medium and cactus_large, same height (70px) as cactus_medium
relationships.differences_from: cactus_medium is 68px wide (2 cacti), cactus_large is 102px wide and 100px tall (3 cacti). Small is narrowest and easiest to jump over

explicit_negations: No animation or movement beyond scrolling
No transparency except full alpha channel
